---
name: Security report
about: Read this before reporting a vulnerability.
title: "[Security contact request]: "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Please do not post vulnerability details, private chromatogram images, logs,
model files, signing configuration, local paths, or exploit steps in a public
issue.

Read the security policy first:

https://github.com/RandoTeam/ChromaLab/blob/master/SECURITY.md

Preferred path:

1. Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting for this repository if available.
2. If private reporting is unavailable, open a minimal public issue titled
   `Security contact request` and wait for a safer coordination path.

## Minimal Public Information

- Affected area: storage / export / evidence package / model import-delete /
  local files / native runtime / other
- Impact category:
- Can this be discussed without private data? yes / no
